title: Osterwalder-Schrader Axioms by EML Depth

analysis.object: T803: Osterwalder-Schrader Axioms by EML Depth depth analysis

os1_regularity.description: OS1: Schwinger functions are tempered distributions -- EML-2 (distribution = measure)

os2_euclidean_covariance.description: OS2: Euclidean SO(4) symmetry -- EML-0 (discrete symmetry group)

os3_reflection_positivity.description: OS3: Reflection positivity -- EML-2 (positive-definiteness of inner product)

os4_symmetry.description: OS4: Permutation symmetry for bosons -- EML-0 (discrete permutation)

os5_clustering.description: OS5: Cluster decomposition -- EML-1 (exponential decay of correlations)

dual_blueprint.description: OS axioms: {EML-0, EML-1, EML-2} -- all EML-finite. The YM measure must satisfy them.
dual_blueprint.reason: All OS axioms are EML-finite -- the axioms are not the EML-inf barrier

t803_theorem.description: T803: All OS axioms live in {EML-0,EML-1,EML-2}. The challenge is constructing a MEASURE that satisfies them. The measure construction is the EML-inf step -- not the axioms. T803.
t803_theorem.reason: The axioms are EML-finite. The measure is EML-inf.

analysis.theorem: T803: Osterwalder-Schrader Axioms by EML Depth (S1082).

key_theorem: T803: Osterwalder-Schrader Axioms by EML Depth (S1082).
